data.content: Implementation review approved. Reviewed commit 4793a2f2 on origin/main: changes are limited to src/components/agent-history-view.tsx and src/components/interaction-picker.tsx, matching the requested Conversation Log and picker scope. The implementation bumps all conversation-log font sizes one step, raises contrast for labels, badges, timestamps, empty states, and title bars, and slightly increases supporting icon sizes/background opacity without changing behavior or widening scope. Sanity gates validated in an isolated checkout of origin/main after bun install --frozen-lockfile: bun run lint exited 0 with unrelated existing warnings outside this knot; bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed.
